name: Drugs and Crime Idle
short_description: Behind every great fortune, lies a great crime! Sell drugs, attack with your gang, gamble your CrimeCoins away and hope, that you get that rare item, finally. Free-to-play. Offline Progression. No Microtransactions except 2 optional DLCs.
detailed_description:
Drugs and Crime Idle is a free, offline, idle game about selling drugs and building your criminal empire.

Produce drugs and upgrade your dealers. Attack with your thugs and generate CrimeCoin, which you can spend on opening 6 different chests, with the chance to add 1 out 15 items to your collection.

8 Dealers, 8 Buildings, 6 Upgrades, 8 Money laundering options, 6 Crates, 15 Items and more.

The game has 24 hours offline progression, which is only half as efficient.

An optional ActionPoin(AP) system, which promotes active play.

The game is free and has no microtransactions. The only real money related thing are the DLCs. Those give some early game advantages. All content is available to free and DLC players.

All older versions of the game are available under the betas tab and will remain playable.
